TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_lami, title = lami, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/lami} }

S.FORM: lami liyaw a lami nua caucau a sepayuan, izua va'u, vasa, djulis, vurati, vuday, taruimu katua paday.
S.PHON: ɭami ɭijaw a ɭami nua ʦauʦau a səpajuan, izua vaʔu, vasa, ɉuɭis, vurati, vudaj, taruimu katua padaj.
S.FORM: lami liyaw a lami nua caucau a sepayuan, izua va'u, vasa, djulis, vurati, vuday, taruimu katua paday.
S.PHON: ɭami ɭijaw a ɭami nua ʦauʦau a səpajuan, izua vaʔu, vasa, ɉuɭis, vurati, vudaj, taruimu katua padaj.
